title: Category
description: A product category in the catalog category tree.

parent_id.description: Numeric ID of the parent category.

is_active.description: Whether the category is active and visible in the storefront.

level.description: Depth level of the category in the tree (root = 1).

children.description: Comma-separated list of child category IDs.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the category was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the category was last updated.

path.description: Path string of category IDs from root to this category, separated by slashes.

include_in_menu.description: Whether this category appears in the navigation menu.

custom_attributes.description: Custom EAV attribute values for this category.
